description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that incorporates three local configuration files via include: .gitlab/ci/include/secrets-self-contained.yml, .gitlab/ci/templates.gitlab-ci.yml, and .gitlab/ci/test.gitlab-ci.yml. The pipeline does not define its own jobs, stages, variables, or services, relying entirely on the included files for all CI/CD logic. Ensure the includes are processed in the order listed so that later files can override earlier definitions if needed.
